EST. JINJA · WEEKEND CAMPS & OUTDOOR EVENTS

We organise camping trips, bush escapes and outdoor meetups for people who'd rather trade the city skyline for a fire, a tent and good company.

SCROLL
EVERY CAMP, A NEW CIRCLE
Who We Are

Camping, but make it about community.

Camp With MHE started as a small group chat planning weekend getaways out of Kampala — and grew into a community of people who keep showing up for the next trip.

We scout the sites, sort the logistics, bring the gear list down to "just you and a backpack," and handle everything from bonfires to bush breakfasts. You show up, we set the scene.

16 Camps Hosted
1,200+ Campers Joined
12 Sites Across Uganda
The Trail Ahead

Upcoming Camps

Every stop on the trail is a fresh date, a new site, and a new group of people around the fire. Here's what's coming up next.

FRI 09 — SUN 11 OCT 2026

Sip & Sizzle

A weekend on the water — boat cruises, bonfire nights, games on the grass and a paint & sip session for those who want to slow right down.

Akabway, Bukaya Individual UGX 150,000 Couple UGX 250,000 VIP UGX 350,000
COMING 2027

Escape The Mainland

Two nights on Samuka Island — boat over, set up camp on the shore, and disconnect properly for a weekend.

Samuka Island 2 nights Boat transfers included
What We Do

Everything but the packing

From scouting the site to keeping the fire going, here's what's sorted before you even arrive.

⛺

Gear & Setup

Tents, sleeping mats and group cooking gear are sorted and set up before you arrive — just bring yourself and let us handle the rest.

🔥

Bonfire Evenings

Every camp ends the same way: a fire, good food, and conversations that run long into the night.

🚐

Group Transport

Shared transport from Kampala to the campsite and back, so getting there is part of the fun, not a logistics headache.

🥾

Guided Activities

Hikes, canoe trips, nature walks and local visits, led by people who know the area and its trails well.

👥

A Ready-Made Crew

Come solo or with friends — every camp is a chance to meet new people who share the same love for the outdoors.

📍

Custom & Private Camps

Planning a getaway for your team, school or friend group? We put together private camps tailored to your dates and budget.

A Program by Camp With MHE

Escape From Maturity — The Escape Game

Our flagship weekend series. Past editions have packed in camping, tubing, hikes, a boat cruise, a stone city tour, board games, beach games, a bonfire and a movie night — all in one long weekend. "Escape From Maturity Season 3" merch says it all.

Ask About the Next Season

More From The Trail

A quick scroll through more moments from past camps — drag or swipe sideways.

From the Trail

Moments Around the Fire

A look at past camps — the sites, the sunsets, and the people who made them.

01 — ARRIVAL

Wheels Down, Tents Up

First stop on the trail — bags dropped, camp taking shape.

02 — THE CREW

New Faces, Familiar Energy

This is what a Camp With MHE crew looks like by hour two.

03 — SETTLING IN

Camp Comes Together

Tents pitched, chairs out, the site starts to feel like home.

04 — GOOD COMPANY

Strangers In, Friends Out

Half the reason people come back for the next one.

05 — VIEWS

Worth The Drive

The kind of view that makes the early start worth it.

06 — DOWNTIME

Slow Hours, Good Talk

Nowhere to be, nothing to check, just the camp and the day.

07 — ACTIVITIES

Out and About

Every camp has a moment that gets retold for weeks after.

08 — FUEL UP

Camp Kitchen Hours

Bush meals taste better than they have any right to.

09 — GROUP SHOT

Say Camp With MHE

The obligatory group photo — never skipped, always a mess.

10 — GOLDEN HOUR

Light Worth Stopping For

That stretch of evening when everyone slows down.

11 — BONFIRE

Where The Night Lands

Every camp ends here — fire, music, and too many stories.

12 — NIGHT MODE

Lanterns On

Camp doesn't stop when the sun does.

13 — WATER TIME

Straight Off The Bank

If there's water nearby, someone's already in it.

14 — TRADITIONS

Becoming a Ritual

The little routines that turn a trip into a tradition.

15 — UNSCRIPTED

Best Bits, Unplanned

The moments nobody plans for end up being the favourites.

16 — THE SITE

Home For The Weekend

Every site has its own character — this one earned its spot on the trail.

17 — TOGETHER

More People, More Fun

The bigger the circle around the fire, the better the night.

18 — WIND DOWN

Last Light

Packing up slow, already talking about the next one.

19 — UNTIL NEXT TIME

See You On The Trail

Tents down, memories made — same time, next camp.

The Escape Game · Past Editions

Where It All Started

Before the trail had a name, there were the seasons that built the crew. Every photo below is from a past edition.

01

Escape from Maturity

14–15 Feb 2020 · Nile Discovery Beach, Njeru–Jinja

The first edition. Tents on the riverbank, board games and Ludo all afternoon, and a bonfire that ran long into the night — the weekend that proved a group chat could become a tradition.

02

Escape Game, 2nd Edition — Escape from Lockdown

2021 · Jinja, on the Nile

A bigger crowd, a bigger camp. Hand-painted "I escaped lockdown" boards, PlayStation under the trees, swims in the river and sunsets over the dam — the season everyone needed after a long year indoors.

Camp Stories

What Our Campers Say

"

Showed up not knowing anyone and left with a group chat full of new friends. The Lake Bunyonyi camp was unreal.

— Brenda, Kampala
"

Everything was sorted before we even got on the bus. All I had to do was bring myself and a jacket.

— Daniel, Entebbe
"

The full moon beach camp is now a tradition for our friend group. Already counting down to the next one.

— Pauline, Mukono
